title: mais
intro: Mais, or Indian mulberry, is a plant that belongs to the family Moraceae and is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The leaves and roots of the mais plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of the mais plant include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as acting as a natural remedy for wounds and burns. Mais can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
